title: Echo Shard Recipes
description: Now craft your own Echo shards
body:
🔮 Echo Shard Recipe Datapack  
Craft the elusive Echo Shard—no ancient cities required!  
This datapack adds a balanced recipe for Echo Shards, enabling recovery compass crafting without deep dark exploration.

✨ Features  
✅ Shaped recipe using 1 Amethyst Shard + 1 Sculk Block  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with sculk and geode progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.19+  

Checkout my other projects:

[Enchanted Golden Apple](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantd-golden-apple-recipe)
[Amethyst Shard](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethyst-shard)
[Horse Armour Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horse-armour-recipe)
[Froglight Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/froglights-recipes)
[Music Disc Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/music-discs)
[Heavy Core Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/heavy-core-recipe)
[Echo Shard Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/echo-shard-recipes)
